since_last: 36% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.73%.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.40% · BTC -1.75% · Gold -1.54% · Nasdaq100 -0.10%. 36% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.73%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.73%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.30%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.30%, ANET +6.51%, AVGO +5.16%, AMBA +5.12%, BIDU +4.80%. Laggards: PANW -4.69%, UPST -4.69%, RXRX -4.30%, ZS -4.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.00% at $147.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.
